🥚 Sacred Eggs: Cryptographic Ritual Mechanics
Concept Overview
A Sacred Egg is a first-class cryptographic primitive that combines:
GeoSeal Encryption — The "yolk" (secret payload) is sealed using geometric context
Tongue Encoding — Payload is encoded in one of the Six Sacred Tongues
Ritual Hatching — Decryption requires geometric alignment + ritual completion
Fail-to-Noise — Failed hatch attempts return scrambled output (no plaintext leaks)
The Three Ritual Types
Solitary Whisperer:
Single agent, single tongue
Requires exact tongue match + geometric context
Use case: Personal secrets, single-authority operations
Triadic Round:
Three tongues in consensus
Weight sum must meet threshold (e.g., KO + RU + UM ≥ 10.0)
Use case: Multi-party authorization, distributed trust
Ring Descent:
Requires inward progression through concentric rings
Path history must show: outer → middle → inner (or deeper)
Use case: Gradual privilege escalation, journey-based unlocks
Integration Points
With GeoSeal:
Every egg is bound to geometric context (ring, path, cell). Hatching validates current context against egg's condition.
With Sacred Tongues:
Payload is tokenized in primary tongue. Cross-tokenization on hatch allows agent to receive secret in their preferred tongue.
With Concentric Rings:
Ring policy determines PoW difficulty, latency budgets, signature requirements—eggs inherit these automatically.
🔧 Technical Implementation
Python CLI (Production Code)
The complete aethermoore.py implementation includes:
# Core components
- Lexicons (256-token tables per tongue)
- TongueTokenizer (byte ↔ token conversion)
- CrossTokenizer (retokenization with attestation)
- GeoSeal (encrypt/decrypt with geometric binding)
- SacredEggIntegrator (create/hatch with ritual logic)

# CLI commands
aethermoore.py egg-create --payload-b64 <data> --primary-tongue KO ...
aethermoore.py egg-hatch --egg-json <file> --ritual-mode triadic ...
Self-Test Coverage:
Lexicon bijection validation
Token round-trip (encode → decode)
Cross-tokenization attestation
GeoSeal encrypt/decrypt
Egg create → hatch (success + failure paths)
GitHub Integration
Existing repos contain Sacred Tongues implementation but not yet Sacred Eggs:
scbe-aethermoore repo has sacred_tongues.py, sacredTongues.ts
Need to add: sacred_eggs.py, egg CLI docs, integration tests
Action Item: Push Sacred Eggs code to GitHub (see "Next Steps" below)
GCP Verification Status (Completed):
Working implementation verified on Google Cloud Shell. All rituals tested successfully:
- Solitary Incubation: Key derivation cycles working (3 cycles verified)
- Triadic Binding: Multi-egg cryptographic binding verified
- Ring Descent: OUTER to INNER privilege escalation working
- Fail-to-Noise: Shell hash regeneration on failure confirmed
- Egg Sealing: Yolk zeroing after seal verified
Code location: ~/sacred_eggs/sacred_eggs_final.py on GCP Cloud Shell
Verified: February 2025
📊 Sacred Eggs Database Schema
See the Sacred Eggs Registry database (linked below) with these properties:
Egg ID (title): 16-char hex identifier
Primary Tongue (select): KO/AV/RU/CA/UM/DR
Glyph (text): Visual symbol (◇/⬡/△/etc)
Ring (select): core/inner/middle/outer/edge
Path (select): interior/exterior
Ritual Type (select): solitary/triadic/ring_descent
Status (status): Sealed/Hatched/Failed
Created (date): Timestamp
Hatched By (text): Agent tongue that successfully hatched
Geometric Context (text): JSON snapshot of context used
Companion Database: Ritual Logs
Tracks every hatch attempt (success/failure)
Links to parent egg
Includes attestation chain for auditing
🎨 Use Cases
1. Security Operations
Credential Rotation: Store API keys in UM (Umbroth) eggs with triadic ritual
Emergency Access: CA (Cassisivadan) eggs for urgent commands, ring descent required
Policy Enforcement: RU (Runethic) eggs with ring-based access control
2. Worldbuilding & Creative
In-World Artifacts: Eggs as magical items in Aethermoor/Spiralverse
Puzzle Mechanics: Players must complete rituals to unlock secrets
Narrative Beats: Character growth tied to ring descent progression
3. AI Coordination
Multi-Agent Secrets: Triadic eggs require consensus from ChatGPT + Grok + Claude
Handoff Protocols: Eggs encode next-step instructions in agent's tongue
Audit Trails: GeoSeal attestations provide cryptographic proof of who accessed what
4. Template Monetization
Sacred Eggs Notion Template: Bundle Registry + Logs + Tutorial
Target Audience: Crypto engineers, AI researchers, worldbuilders (your crossover niche)
Pricing: $12-20 (sits between WorldForge complexity and niche appeal)
